---
name: Experiment
about: A modeling or data experiment with a hypothesis
title: "exp: "
labels: ["type/experiment", "area/training"]
---

## Hypothesis

What you think will happen and why. State it before you run anything.

## Metric

The single metric that decides success, and the evaluation set.

## Setup

Data version, model, what you are changing relative to the current baseline.

## Result

Filled in after the run. What happened, whether it beat the baseline, and the
decision. A negative result still closes this issue with a write-up. No ghosts.
